chapter_title.ar: باب التَّعْقِيبِ بَعْدَ الصَّلَاةِ وَ الدُّعَاءِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 32 – The follow up after the Salāt and the supplication

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/175)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/175)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِذَا شَكَكْتَ فِي تَسْبِيحِ فَاطِمَةَ الزَّهْرَاءِ ( عليها السلام ) فَأَعِدْ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Idrees, from Muhammad Bin Ahmad, raising it, said,
‘Abu Abdullahasws said: ‘When you have a doubt in the Glorification (Tasbīḥ) of Syeda Fatima Al-Zahraasws, so repeat’.
en.sarwar: 11. Ahmad ibn Idris from Muhammad ibn Ahmad in a marfu‘ manner has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If you face uncertainty about Tasbih of Fatimah al- Zahra’, ‘Alayha al-Salam, say it again.’”
